/usr/bin/ar qc libdxf_lib.a CMakeFiles/dxf_lib.dir/src/blocks/Block.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dxf_lib.dir/src/blocks/Blocks.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dxf_lib.dir/src/document/Document.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dxf_lib.dir/src/document/Entity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dxf_lib.dir/src/document/EntityFactory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dxf_lib.dir/src/document/Section.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dxf_lib.dir/src/entities/Arc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dxf_lib.dir/src/entities/AttDef.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dxf_lib.dir/src/entities/Attrib.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dxf_lib.dir/src/entities/Ellipse.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dxf_lib.dir/src/entities/Entities.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dxf_lib.dir/src/entities/Face3d.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dxf_lib.dir/src/entities/Insert.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dxf_lib.dir/src/entities/Line.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dxf_lib.dir/src/entities/MText.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dxf_lib.dir/src/entities/Point.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dxf_lib.dir/src/entities/Text.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dxf_lib.dir/src/entities/TextBase.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dxf_lib.dir/src/entries/Layer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dxf_lib.dir/src/file/File.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dxf_lib.dir/src/tables/Table.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dxf_lib.dir/src/tables/TableEntry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dxf_lib.dir/src/tables/TableFactory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dxf_lib.dir/src/tables/Tables.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libdxf_lib.a
